water.name: San Gabriel River (upstream of Highway 22 bridge to start of concrete-lined channel)

authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(88) — San Gabriel River (Los Angeles and Orange Cos.)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 1654998, "San Gabriel River", Stream, CA, Los Angeles/Orange Cos.
sources.quotedText: GNIS's San Gabriel River stream record (gaz_id 1654998) traces the river's course as a multipoint line through Los Angeles and Orange Cos.; the regulation boundary point (Highway 22 / Garden Grove Fwy bridge over the San Gabriel River) was pinpointed via OpenStreetMap/Overpass (bridge way crossing the river waterway at approx. 33.7742,-118.0978), correcting the file's prior coordinate (-118.0950,33.7900), which sat ~1.8km away, north of the true bridge crossing.

parameters.note: Applies to the segment of the San Gabriel River upstream of the Highway 22 bridge to the start of the concrete-lined portion of the river channel.

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through November 30, upstream of the Highway 22 bridge to the start of the concrete-lined channel
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Nov. 30.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Open to fishing for non-salmonids only; closed to the take of trout and steelhead.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to the take of trout and steelhead; open to fishing for non-salmonids only
regulations.verbatimText: Open to fishing for non-salmonids only. Closed to the take of trout and steelhead.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
